productDisplayName: French Connection Men Multi Coloured Cargo Shorts
description: Style NoteClassic checked shorts get a season update from french connection. This stylish piece is a super comfy pair that's versatile enough to be dressed up or pared down to the basics. Wear this with a monochrome tee to balance your look.Product DetailsRed, grey, yellow, blue and white checked shorts, has a button closure at the waistband centre and a concealed three button fly, drawstring and loops at the waistband, two insert pockets on the sides in front, one open patch pocket on the left lower thigh region with pleat detail, one patch pocket on the right lower thigh with buttoned flap closure and pleat detail with one small patch pocket on it with a buttoned flap and two patch pockets at the back with buttoned flap closureMaterial and Care100% cottonWash as cottonWash and dry inside outSize and FitWide FitThe model (height 6' and waist 32") is wearing a size 32
